author: aamodbhatt
name: Compact 12x384 1xH100 10m
blurb: Non-record 16MB track run on 1xH100 for 10 minutes using a smaller 12-layer 384-dim architecture with GQA (6 heads, 3 KV heads). This experiment targets a stronger size-quality tradeoff versus baseline, producing a 9.67MB total int8+zlib artifact and a final roundtrip score of 1.3693 val_bpb.
